Interface IUIFactoryService

Defines a service for accessing UI-related factories.

The IUIFactoryService interface is implemented by the PhiRobotics ui framework and is not intended for consumer implementation.

Namespace: PhiRobotics.UI
Assembly: PhiRobotics.UI.dll
Syntax
public interface IUIFactoryService
Remarks

This service acts as a centralized entry point for obtaining factory instances used to create UI components and resources, such as alert panels and SVG images.

Properties

AlertPanelFactory

Gets the factory for creating alert panels.

Declaration
IAlertPanelFactory AlertPanelFactory { get; }
Property Value
Type Description
IAlertPanelFactory

Declaration
ICommonDialogFactory CommonDialogFactory { get; }
